description_long: This object is a modern, tan-colored machine gun with a robust and angular design, featuring a prominent box magazine mounted beneath the receiver. The weapon has a long, cylindrical barrel with a flash suppressor at the muzzle and a fixed stock at the rear, providing stability for sustained fire. A scope or optical sight is mounted on the top rail, enhancing aiming capabilities. The handguard is squared and includes a vertical foregrip for improved control during operation. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of contemporary military firearms. The finish is matte, reducing glare and making it suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A tan, modern machine gun with a box magazine, long barrel, fixed stock, and top-mounted optic, featuring a matte finish and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical barrel, flash suppressor, and vertical foregrip, with the box magazine partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the box magazine, fixed stock, and the top-mounted optic.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the magazine and optic less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the magazine and handguard clearly visible.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with flash suppressor
attribute_stock_design: fixed polymer stock with open framework
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: simple notch and blade with top-mounted optic
